name: Illinois Central Sch Bus-West
owner_or_parent: H.I.G. Capital (acquired Aug 2021 from Goldner Hawn); operating arm of North America Central School Bus (NACSB), HQ Joliet, IL
districts_or_customers: West Chicago Elementary School District 33 and 125+ districts across IL, IN, WI, MO, KS, PA, ID, IA, TX, and Ontario
recent_news: H.I.G. Infrastructure acquired NACSB from Goldner Hawn in Aug 2021; NACSB is the 5th-largest school bus operator in North America with ~3,000 buses and 50 locations.
fit_notes: NOT a tuck-in target. This is a PE-owned platform (H.I.G. Capital) and a direct competitor of Summit at national scale. Disqualify.

name: Usfi A Bus Unit Of Safeguard
owner_or_parent: Deluxe Corporation (NYSE: DLX) - USFI was acquired by Safeguard Business Acquisitions and Mergers (BAM), a Deluxe subsidiary, in 2015; rebranded as Deluxe Branded Marketing - Dallas in 2019
districts_or_customers: None - not a school bus operator
recent_news: USFI is a business printing/marketing services unit of Deluxe Corp; no evidence of school bus operations. The 'bus' in the listing name appears to be a data error (likely 'business unit').
fit_notes: NOT a target. This is not a school-bus operator - USFI is a Deluxe Corp business-printing/marketing unit in Dallas. Source data is mislabeled (likely interpreted 'A Business Unit of Safeguard' as a bus reference). Disqualify.

name: Lucero Bus Co Inc
districts_or_customers: Listed on New Mexico PED School Bus Contractor List; serves the Albuquerque area, likely small APS or surrounding district routes
recent_news: Active FMCSA carrier (DOT #1942352) since Sept 2009 with 2 power units and 1 driver per FMCSA; small intrastate (within 100 miles) operator. Possibly related to the larger Herrera School Buses & Coaches family (Martin Herrera) which had a 2024 APS lawsuit dispute, but Lucero is a separate entity.
fit_notes: Sub-scale single-operator with only 2 buses - too small for a Summit tuck-in by itself, but could be a roll-up component in NM. Possible Herrera family connection worth exploring as part of broader NM consolidation strategy.

name: Coast Bus
districts_or_customers: Not identified as a school bus contractor; Dover School District uses First Student for school transport
recent_news: No matching school bus operator found at 5 Pineview Dr, Dover NH. The well-known 'COAST' (Cooperative Alliance for Seacoast Transportation) is a public-transit non-profit at 42 Sumner Dr, Dover - not a school-bus contractor and not at this address. Website 'coastpekee.com' is not a valid domain. Listing appears to be erroneous or a defunct micro-entity.
fit_notes: NOT a viable target. No identifiable independent school bus operator at this address. Likely a data-quality artifact (4 employees / $150k revenue) - possibly a personal vehicle registration. Disqualify.

name: Prairie Bus Svc
owner_or_parent: 4.0 School Services (rebranded from Prairie Bus Service in 2005); HQ Saint Peter, MN
principals: Mike Hennek (founder & co-owner of 4.0 School Services)
districts_or_customers: Lester Prairie School District and multiple MN districts (Minneota, Saint Peter and others) via 4.0 School Services umbrella
recent_news: Originally founded 1994 in Saint Peter, MN by Mike Hennek as Prairie Bus Service; rebranded to 4.0 School Services in 2005. Hennek received the NSTA Golden Merit Award in 2004. Now operates as a multi-district MN school transportation, consulting and groundskeeping platform.
fit_notes: Possible mid-size MN tuck-in. 4.0 School Services is a founder-owned (Mike Hennek) MN platform with school transport, consulting and groundskeeping across multiple districts - 30+ years of operation indicates real succession opportunity. Worth a direct outreach as a regional MN bolt-on for Summit.
